_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: WUPA cells were strongly immunopositive for GFAP, a small portion (<10%) were faintly immunopositive for OLIG2, and were all negative for synaptophysin (neuronal marker)
details: Strongly immunopositive for GFAP, small portion (<10%) faintly immunopositive for OLIG2, and all negative for synaptophysin expression
